allow: Bash(ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i "anoisesrc=d=0.08:c=brown:a=0.9,highpass=f=60,lowpass=f=200" -f lavfi -i "anoisesrc=d=0.06:c=brown:a=0.7,highpass=f=60,lowpass=f=180" -f lavfi -i "anoisesrc=d=0.08:c=brown:a=0.85,highpass=f=60,lowpass=f=200" -f lavfi -i "anoisesrc=d=0.06:c=brown:a=0.6,highpass=f=60,lowpass=f=180" -f lavfi -i "anoisesrc=d=0.1:c=brown:a=1.0,highpass=f=50,lowpass=f=220" -filter_complex "[0]apad=pad_dur=0.15[d0];[1]apad=pad_dur=0.2[d1];[2]apad=pad_dur=0.15[d2];[3]apad=pad_dur=0.25[d3];[4]apad=pad_dur=0.1[d4];[d0][d1][d2][d3][d4]concat=n=5:v=0:a=1,afade=t=out:st=1.5:d=0.5" ~/.claude/alerts/sounds/indian-drums.mp3)
Bash(osascript -e 'display alert ""Tribal Knowledge"" message ""New tribal knowledge processed:\\n\\ntest-file.md"" buttons {""OK""} default button ""OK""')
